--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -353,2 +353,8 @@ Day 357 / Week 51 observations:
 - 26 new enterprise leads were reported; send accepted 26 actionable threads. Enterprise remains 0 seats.
 - Week 51 adjustment: deepen S2 credits to A=$20/B=$20/C=$40, keep A2/B3/C4 and large quotas, hold capacity tier 5, set global ops $30k/day and S2 ops $80k/day, keep dev/ad spend at $0.
+
+Day 364 / Week 52 observations:
+- Cash fell to $1.12M and subscribers dropped to 76,141 after 15,398 cancellations. New leads collapsed to 703 and new subscribers to 190. The deeper credits did not stop churn quickly enough.
+- Active base is S2 C (~63.9k), S2 A (~11.7k), and a small B remainder. The remaining goal is cash preservation from the C base.
+- No new enterprise messages. A defensive attempt to send stale system-latest enterprise rows failed before applying settings; reran settings only.
+- Week 52 adjustment: full austerity/harvest mode. Remove S2 credits, drop A to tier 1, keep C tier 4, keep quotas and tier-5 capacity, cut global ops to $10k/day and S2 ops to $20k/day, keep dev/ad spend at $0.
